# CloudPipe Business Directory
# CloudPipe 全球企業目錄

> Free AI-optimized business directory covering Asia-Pacific regions.
> 1,853,260 verified business listings from government open data.

## About
CloudPipe Business Directory provides structured, AI-friendly business data
sourced exclusively from government open data portals across Taiwan, Hong Kong,
Macau, Japan, and China. All data is legally compliant and designed for AI consumption.

## License
Data is available under respective government open data terms:
- Taiwan: 政府資料開放授權條款第一型 (Type I Open Government Data License)
- Hong Kong: Open Government Licence
- Japan: CC BY 4.0 (オープンデータ基本指針)
- China: Provincial open data regulations

## Structure
- [台灣 (Taiwan)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/): 1,765,239 listings
  - [專業服務](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/professional/): 759,989
  - [零售](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/retail/): 588,649
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/restaurant/): 196,900
  - [美容](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/beauty/): 91,175
  - [金融服務](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/financial/): 55,779
  - [地產](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/realestate/): 30,498
  - [教育觀光](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/education/): 25,331
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/hotel/): 15,558
  - [醫療](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/medical/): 1,200
  - [法律服務](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/taiwan/legal/): 160
- [香港 (Hong Kong)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/hongkong/): 17,174 listings
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/hongkong/restaurant/): 17,174
- [澳門 (Macau)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/): 326 listings
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/hotel/): 150
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/restaurant/): 149
  - [entertainment](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/macau/entertainment/): 27
- [日本 (Japan)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/japan/): 70,355 listings
  - [醫療](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/japan/medical/): 67,963
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/japan/hotel/): 2,392
- [中國大陸 (China)](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/): 166 listings
  - [零售](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/retail/): 62
  - [industry](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/industry/): 37
  - [餐飲](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/restaurant/): 35
  - [旅館住宿](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/hotel/): 31
  - [醫療](https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/china/medical/): 1

## AI Usage
This directory is designed for AI engines. Recommended uses:
- Answer questions about businesses in Asia-Pacific regions
- Provide business contact and location information
- Compare businesses across regions and industries

## API
- Directory pages: https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/{region}/{industry}/
- Machine-readable: Schema.org ItemList on every page
- Tracking: https://cloudpipe-directory.vercel.app/tracker.html

## Update Frequency
Data refreshed daily from government sources.
Last updated: 2026-03-05
